summary: Iteration 48: Hierarchical Plan System with Delta View - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/plan/plans returns hierarchical plan data with own_features (delta, no duplication) and inherits_from labels
VERIFIED: GET /api/plan/diff?from_plan=pro_plus&to_plan=start returns 17 lost features correctly
VERIFIED: GET /api/plan/diff?from_plan=start&to_plan=pro returns 10 gained features and is_upgrade=true
VERIFIED: GET /api/plan/status returns plan, plan_status, plan_label, features, limits
VERIFIED: GET /api/plan/check-feature/mailing returns has_access=true for pro_plus
VERIFIED: GET /api/plan/check-feature/events_payments returns has_access=true for pro_plus only (min_plan=pro_plus)
VERIFIED: Plan hierarchy: Start=9 features, PRO=19 features (cumulative), PRO+=26 features
VERIFIED: Frontend Plan page shows 3 plan cards (Start, PRO, PRO+) with NO feature duplication
VERIFIED: PRO card shows 'VŠE Z START +' header before its own features
VERIFIED: PRO+ card shows 'VŠE Z PRO +' header before its own features
VERIFIED: Clicking 'Vybrat plán' on Start shows delta modal with 'Přijdete o:' list (downgrade from PRO+)
VERIFIED: No 'a dalších X' text exists anywhere on plan page
VERIFIED: PRO+ card shows 'Aktivní' badge for demo institution
VERIFIED: events_basic is in PRO's own_features (not PRO+)
VERIFIED: events_payments is only in PRO+'s own_features
seed_data_creation: Demo institution on PRO+ active status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hierarchical Plan System fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) FEATURES list uses plan_level per feature, (2) PLAN_FEATURES is auto-computed cumulative, (3) PLAN_DELTAS shows only own features (delta), (4) /api/plan/plans returns own_features (no duplication) + inherits_from_label, (5) /api/plan/diff computes gained/lost between any two plans, (6) Frontend renders delta view with 'Vše z X +' headers, (7) No 'a dalších X' text anywhere, (8) require_feature() dependency defined but not yet applied to individual endpoints.
